missions.title: Cell Structure and Function - Section 1
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering cell theory, prokaryotic cell, eukaryotic cell and more.

microtargets.title: Cell theory
mustKnowFacts: Cell theory is a fundamental subtopic of Cell Structure and Function.
Crucial to understand the principles governing Cell theory for NEET.

commonTraps: Students often misinterpret Cell theory during complex MCQs.
Failing to apply the correct logic for Cell theory.

pyqPatterns: Past year questions frequently ask about Cell theory.
